case_title: GLENDALE FEDERAL BANK,FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK,CAL/CO vs. LEAVITT, EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLENDALE FEDERAL BANK,FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK,CAL/CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEAVITT, EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 66 WESTWOOD DRIVE, ADDITIONAL TERMS- SEE FULL TEXT OF JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLENDALE FEDERAL BANK,FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK,CAL/CO AS TO DEFENDANT LEAVITT, EDWARD DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLENDALE FEDERAL BANK,FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK,CAL/CO LEAVITT, EDWARD
